description:
Implement /context switch command family in pi-context extension closing FGAP-179. Scope: (a) /context switch <existing-dir> — flip pointer to existing substrate dir (validate target has config.json + is shaped substrate before flip); (b) /context switch -c <new-dir> — bootstrap new substrate dir via initProject-equivalent and flip pointer; (c) /context switch - — flip to previous contextDir per pointer.previous_contextDir field; (d) /context list companion — discover substrate dirs in cwd (scan for dirs with config.json); (e) /context archive <dir> separate command — move substrate dir to archive/<dir>/ + write-protect (substrate-delete-equivalent isolated from switch surface). Pointer-shape extension at packages/pi-context/schemas/pi-context-pointer.schema.json (or wherever the pointer schema lives) bumping v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 adding optional previous_contextDir + switched_at + switched_by fields; identity migration declared via write-schema-migration per FGAP-136. Add new relation_type references_cross_substrate_item to config.relation_types[] supporting sentinel-form cross-substrate edges (substrate-name:id). initProject argument-handling fix at packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:266: when existing pointer differs from caller's contextDir arg, fail loudly with structured guide-message pointing to /context switch -c <dir> as the correct command (rather than silently dropping the argument as current behavior). Every switch operation routes through pi-dispatch auth-gate per FGAP-134/138 for writer.kind=human attestation + interactive confirmation. Closes FGAP-179. Enables DEC-0036 cutover (the first use of /context switch -c .context is the cutover itself). Closing-citation will name branch + adversarial-probe path + VER attestation per the canonical pipeline.

Closing-citation (2026-05-30): completed_by=human:davidryan@gmail.com; completed_at=2026-05-30T11:05:00Z; branch=task-094-context-switch; commits cdacdb4..53000d6 (11 source + 1 demo + 1 skills/scan + 1 VER = 14 total); HEAD=53000d6; adversarial-probe at /tmp/task-094-adversarial-probe.md returned 4/4 PASS; runtime-demo at scripts/orchestrator/runtime-demo-context-switch.ts 6/6 assertions PASS; VER-066 attests with 12 criteria_results enumerated; closes FGAP-179 (status identified to superseded_by via this TASK).
acceptance_criteria: /context switch <existing-dir> implemented; flip succeeds against valid substrate; fails loudly on non-substrate target
/context switch -c <new-dir> implemented; bootstraps new substrate dir AND flips pointer in one operation; new substrate dir has config.json scaffold + schemas/ dir
/context switch - implemented; flips to previous contextDir per pointer.previous_contextDir; fails loudly when previous_contextDir absent
/context list implemented; returns discoverable substrate dirs in cwd
/context archive <dir> implemented; moves substrate to archive/<dir>/ + write-protects; non-default operation requiring explicit invocation
Pointer schema bumped 1.0.0 → 1.1.0 with optional previous_contextDir + switched_at + switched_by fields; identity migration declared via write-schema-migration
config.relation_types[] includes references_cross_substrate_item supporting sentinel cross-substrate edges

initProject at packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:266 fails loudly with structured guide-message when existing pointer differs from caller's contextDir argument; no silent argument-drop; misleading 'Project initialized' message replaced
Every switch operation routes through pi-dispatch auth-gate (FGAP-134/138); writer.kind=human attestation stamped on pointer's switched_by field
Build/check/test green; new tests cover each switch mode + the loud-fail initProject path + cross-substrate sentinel resolution
Adversarial probe (fresh-context Explore) verifies the 5 commands behave per spec + the auth-gate routing fires + the pointer-shape migration is honored
Status cascade complete (FGAP-179 status identified → superseded_by this TASK; new VER attests TASK completion; supersession edge filed)
